ddls:
CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "is_city" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the precinct is a city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city (if applicable) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the precinct is located */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the precinct */,
  "voting_age_population" INTEGER /* Voting age population of the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county Seat" TEXT /* County seat of the county */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the county was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "active_voters" INTEGER /* Number of active voters */,
  "voted_voters" INTEGER /* Number of voters who have voted */,
  "overall_active_percent" REAL /* Overall active voter percentage */,
  "overall_voted_percent" REAL /* Overall voted voter percentage */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of the registration data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the registration data (e.g., election commission, voter records) */,
  "democrat_voters" INTEGER /* Number of democrat voters */,
  "republican_voters" INTEGER /* Number of republican voters */,
  "independent_voters" INTEGER /* Number of independent voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id", "registration_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the election was held */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "voted_voters" INTEGER /* Number of voters who voted in the election */,
  "voter_turnout_percent" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, special) */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office being voted on (e.g., president, governor, mayor) */,
  "candidates" TEXT /* List of candidates in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_records" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the voter is registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the voter */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the voter */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter was registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the voter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the voter */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the voter is registered */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the voter */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the voter (e.g., democrat, republican, independent) */,
  "voter_id_number" TEXT /* Voter ID number assigned to the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_records_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_records_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting history record */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "voted_date" TEXT /* Date the voter voted */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, mail, absentee) */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the voter cast votes */,
  "absentee_ballot" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the voter used an absentee ballot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_history_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_records ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_history_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "table_affected" TEXT /* Table affected by the action */,
  "record_affected" INTEGER /* Record affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
